title: Local Attention Mechanism: Boosting the Transformer Architecture for Long-Sequence Time Series Forecasting
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un mecanismo de atención local eficiente que explota las propiedades de continuidad de las series temporales para mejorar el rendimiento de transformers en predicción de largo plazo.
abstract: Transformer architectures have shown great potential for time series forecasting. However, standard attention mechanisms suffer from quadratic complexity and may not fully exploit the temporal continuity properties of time series data. This paper introduces a Local Attention Mechanism (LAM) that runs in O(n log n) time and memory complexity while achieving superior performance on long-sequence forecasting tasks.

citations.apa: Aguilera-Martos, I., Herrera-Poyatos, A., Luengo, J., & Herrera, F. (2026). Local Attention Mechanism: Boosting the Transformer Architecture for Long-Sequence Time Series Forecasting. Machine Intelligence Research.
citations.mla: Aguilera-Martos, Ignacio, et al. "Local Attention Mechanism: Boosting the Transformer Architecture for Long-Sequence Time Series Forecasting." Machine Intelligence Research, 2026.

contributions: Local Attention Mechanism for time series
